subcodes.title: Words to a group of Persian students, spoken on 1913-02-19
subcodes.first_line: The well-known Persian students of the past were unable to bring about any advancements in their native land
subcodes.first_line_orig: محصّلین مشهور سابقین که کاری از پیش نبردند بلکه انشآءاللّٰه شما خدمتی بایران نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @education of children; moral education, @excellence; distinction
